---
title: "Abandoned Burrito"
image: "data:image/jpeg;base64,"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/tony-durst-314173/"
  - label: Twitter
    url: "https://twitter.com/tdurst"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/tonydurst"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:tonydurst@gmail.com"
output:
  postcards::jolla_blue
---
 
Just a small town boy in a big city world
